title: astragalus beckwithii
intro: Astragalus beckwithii, also known as Beckwith's milkvetch, is a perennial plant species within the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, which help the body to resist physical and emotional stress. Astragalus beckwithii has been found to have a range of health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and reduce fatigue. In terms of herbal preparations, Astragalus beckwithii is often used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is typically consumed as a tea or capsule, although it is also available in supplement form.
